ValidationRule.description: Prevents moving from Client Coded to Trading unless all go-live conditions are met.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, 'Trading'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Stage__c), 'Client Coded'), OR( NOT(Confirmation_Letter_Sent__c), NOT(Welcome_Email_Sent__c), NOT(Banking_Rails_Configured__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Cannot move to Trading — please use the "Confirm Go Live" button to complete the go-live checklist. All three conditions must be met: confirmation letter sent, welcome email sent, and banking rails configured.
